rows.label: qev055102_MSG0001
rows.name:
You're...?!
Tch... What are you doing in a place like this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055102_MSG0002
rows.name:
Hmm... Let me deduce the reason
why you are here right now...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055102_MSG0003
rows.name:
...I see. Did Sun'boiton and the others ask you
to come save me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055102_MSG0004
rows.name:
The tables have turned, Definia.
Now it is your turn to be cornered.
And there is an 89.6% probability that you will die.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055102_MSG0005
rows.name:
Fool! Come any closer and I'll kill this thing!
If you value its life,
then walk away quietly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055102_JNK0010
rows.name: Obey

rows.label: qev055102_SEL0011
rows.name:
Follow the Definia's orders
and step back.

rows.label: qev055102_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev055102_SEL0021
rows.name: Forcefully step forward.

rows.label: qev055102_MSG0006
rows.name:
How foolish. A moment's thought would tell you
that this person cannot kill me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055102_MSG0007
rows.name:
This person was ordered to bring me back alive.
Therefore, if they kill me here...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055102_MSG0008
rows.name:
The only outcome is that they will be punished
for disobeying orders.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055102_MSG0009
rows.name:
After all, both the Definia and us Orphe
are nothing more than disposable tools to the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055102_MSG0010
rows.name:
A wise choice. As long as they are ordered to bring me back alive,
a lowly Definia cannot possibly kill me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055102_MSG0011
rows.name:
If they did such a thing, it would be their turn
to be punished as a traitor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055102_MSG0012
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055102_MSG0013
rows.name: ...Damn it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055102_MSG0014
rows.name:
It's true that I can't kill you.
However...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055102_MSG0015
rows.name:
Once I slaughter this Earthling,
I'll make you taste every kind of agony imaginable
so you can't run that smart mouth of yours ever again![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055102_MSG0016
rows.name:
Here I come. Before I torture the insect...
I'll slaughter you small fry first![ST:wait ]
